## Summary

## Checklist
- [ ] `mise run test` (and `mise run test-race` if touching concurrency) passes
- [ ] `cd web && pnpm run check && pnpm run test:unit` passes
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` is clean
- [ ] README / `config.example.toml` updated if flags or config changed
- [ ] No secrets or co-author trailers in the commits
